description: Letter in Hebrew. Probably a draft. Dating: probably late, ca. 14th–16th century. Addressed to a notable named Binyamin, with regards for his sons Yaʿaqov and Yeshuʿa, probably residents of Jerusalem. Also mentioned: Shemuel ha-Maskil, Menashshe and Shemarya. The sender regrets his separation from them and asks them not to forget him. AA/ASE
